headline.text: L3 Truffle Line guillotine was down *1 hour 15 minutes* on an electrical fault — cleared at 06:45 and restarted at 06:50.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 cleared a Yamato scale issue in 11 minutes on Sollich 3 and released quarantined chocolate at 05:40 after overnight coordination with QA. Tunnel 3 belt is down with maintenance on-site as of 07:08, and Cavanna recipe changes are blocked pending Troy's arrival with passwords.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 cleared four short stoppages across ML2 and ML3 including mold jams, a film tear, and caramel temperature adjustments. ML2's mold evacuation tooth went out of alignment three times in the shift; maintenance reports no obvious cause and camera footage is password-locked.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 cleared a 1 hour 15 minute guillotine fault on Truffle Line at 06:45, replaced a torn Sweco screen overnight, and resolved metal shavings traced to a loose bolt. MF Matrix has a recurring product clog issue flagged twice with no fix, and an improper LOTO on Truffle Line used a zip tie instead of a lock.

notes.text: BEQ Pouches require 11 employees including 2 extra for trays and 3 for hopper positions per Rich Brierley at 12:48.
Caramel delivery arrived at 09:26 without COA; QA released for use by 13:23 after coordination with supplier.
Transferred 1,600 lbs of 10227 chocolate from Sollich 2 buffer to Sollich 3 for Brookies at 01:51.

resolved.title: Sollich 2 chocolate in quarantine status
resolved.summary: All dark chocolate (10276) pallets in quarantine, no COAs available; decision made to melt and hold product until release.
resolved.resolution: Chocolate released at 05:40 — "the chocolate has been taken off quarantine and is good to use" (Candon Watt).

resolved.title: Sollich 3 Yamato scale issue
resolved.summary: Yamato having issues, operator recalibrating and passing accumulation; line down.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:13 — "line is back to run" (Luis Falcon).

resolved.title: ML3 ran out of caramel, no COA on new delivery
resolved.summary: Stopped depositing at 11:52 after running out of caramel; newly arrived caramel had no COA.
resolved.resolution: QA released caramel for use with quarantine hold at 13:23 (Hervin Herrera), back depositing at 12:25 after heating tank.

resolved.title: ML2 mold jam on top row
resolved.summary: Mold jam stopping line; maintenance working on evacuation chain.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 13:19 — "line back up running" (ML2 FW).

resolved.title: ML3 caramel filler emptying, not depositing
resolved.summary: Filler getting empty at 18:11, line running but not depositing; maintenance working, temperature issue.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:29 — temperature raised from 89°F to 94°F, percentage range adjusted from 45 to 65, "we are depositing again" (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML2 flow wrap screen not functioning
resolved.summary: HMI screen not working, couldn't make adjustments; restarted system.
resolved.resolution: Down 6 minutes, cleared at 17:39 — "we are up and running again" (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML2 cooler problem at 18:42
resolved.summary: Cooler issue stopped line; maintenance fixed quickly.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:45 — "maintenance fixed the issue, we are running again" (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: Metal shavings found on Truffle Line
resolved.summary: Metal shavings discovered at 15:06; traced to missing piece on bolt plate causing movement.
resolved.resolution: Cause identified at 16:04 — "on the plate where the bolt goes into there's a piece missing which caused it to move" — area cleaned, capture test passed, line restarted.

resolved.title: Nut and bolt found inside matrix area
resolved.summary: Foreign material discovered; maintenance called to determine origin and adjust.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:09 — "ready" after maintenance determined location and adjusted.

resolved.title: Guillotine knife not starting, electrical fault
resolved.summary: Cutting knife on Truffle Line would not start with no error code; maintenance traced to fault in main electrical box and restarted system.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:45 — "guillotine is up and running, maintenance restarted the system, the main problem was a fault in the main electric box" — line started at 06:50.

resolved.title: MF Matrix weight issues
resolved.summary: Weight problems flagged at 13:28; maintenance made adjustments to recipe.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:18 — "maintenance made changes to the recipe."

resolved.title: Truffle Line depositor alarm, temps too high
resolved.summary: Line attempting to start but getting alarm; temps too high at 17:00, belt not moving prevented deposit.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 17:20 — "we're depositing now, the issue ended up being because the belt was not moving it wasn't allowing it to deposit."

resolved.title: Sweco screen torn during disassembly
resolved.summary: Tear found on Truffle Line Sweco screen during cleaning; replaced with new screen overnight.
resolved.resolution: New screen installed, visual and ATP passed at 03:16 (Luisiana Castro).

resolved.title: ML4 mold inserter trays falling through
resolved.summary: Trays falling through inserter; maintenance working on issue.
resolved.resolution: Root cause found at 04:43 — "bolts were left loose by whoever cleaned it, causing chain support plate to hit loosely when molds cycling. Luckily operator caught before it caused damage."

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna blowing chocolate from conveyor bottom
resolved.summary: Chocolate blowing out of bottom of Cavanna conveyor; maintenance fixing.
resolved.resolution: Implied resolved by continued operation shown in later status updates through end of shift.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 Cavanna recipe change blocked by password
needs_attention.summary: Cannot change Cavanna recipes because password is not available; Troy scheduled to arrive early to make changes.
needs_attention.status: Issue flagged at 05:08 and 05:22; Troy scheduled to arrive early per Justin at 05:42, no completion confirmation by window close.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 Tunnel 3 belt not working
needs_attention.summary: Tunnel 3 belt down, maintenance on-site as of 07:08.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance on-site at 07:08, no update by window close at 07:15.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 4 kitchen table damaged
needs_attention.summary: Kitchen table damaged, possibly from scrap pallet contact.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 12:57, no repair or assessment posted.

needs_attention.title: Tarp wall areas need repair
needs_attention.summary: Multiple areas on tarp wall flagged as needing repair.
needs_attention.status: Flagged to Jody at 01:06, no repair scheduled or completed.

needs_attention.title: New wash area water temperature insufficient
needs_attention.summary: New wash area hose tied into heat exchanger running at 120°F; will not clean caramel due to low temp and pressure. May need contractor to tie into steam line.
needs_attention.status: Identified at 05:06, recommendation to have contractor tie into steam line for higher temps; no action taken by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML2 mold tooth out of alignment — third occurrence
needs_attention.summary: Evacuation chain tooth went out of alignment three times in the shift (12:43, 16:37, 18:46); maintenance reports chain is tight, molds move freely, possibly servo drive or incorrect referencing but can't determine root cause.
needs_attention.status: Third occurrence at 18:46, camera footage password-locked preventing review. Recurring issue with no root cause identified as of window close.

needs_attention.title: ML3 flow wrap label cutting issue at 15:27
needs_attention.summary: Line down to switch roll of flow wrap label that was getting cut.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 15:27, switching roll; no clear "back up running" confirmation posted.

needs_attention.title: Improper LOTO on Truffle Line metal detector
needs_attention.summary: Lock would not fit on e-stop during cleaning; team used zip tie instead, which prevents proper lockout/tagout.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 09:10, no corrective action posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix area clogging with product twice
needs_attention.summary: Area clogged with product at 19:27, happened twice; maintenance notified. Root cause is exposed silver adhesive causing pieces to stick together.
needs_attention.status: Issue identified as adhesive at 19:58, recurring problem with no fix implemented as of window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix buckets falling, not taking correct weight
needs_attention.summary: Buckets falling and not deducting corresponding weight; re-zero being done.
needs_attention.status: Re-zero in progress at 06:43, no completion confirmation.

needs_attention.title: ML4 licking roller and scraper push unclear
needs_attention.summary: Question raised whether licking roller and scraper pipes were pushed during changeover; not marked as checked on whiteboard.
needs_attention.status: Asked at 06:59, no clear answer from Tyson by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 depositor 4 slider won't enter
needs_attention.summary: Having hard time installing one of the sliders on depositor 4; maintenance on-site but still not entering, waiting for Alex WDS.
needs_attention.status: As of 07:07, slider still not entering, waiting on Alex WDS who should arrive soon.

needs_attention.title: ML4 damaged blade on licking roller #2
needs_attention.summary: Damage on blade for one of the licking rollers noticed during setup; reportedly flagged ~3 weeks ago by Kim but not repaired.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 11:36, Preston confirms it was reported 3 weeks ago but details unclear; no repair completed.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix tools missing — scissor
needs_attention.summary: Tools are lacking, scissor is missing from area.
